negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_174
prompt: A man dressed in a black martial arts uniform, including a white headband, performs a series of controlled movements against a brick wall adorned with various framed artworks. The central artwork features a fierce tiger, flanked by another with a humanoid figure and golden dragons, and another with a stylized face with vibrant colors. The man stands centrally in the frame, facing to his left. He begins by lowering his left arm from an overhead position, turning to his left and stepping forward with his right foot. He then smoothly lowers both hands, extending them forward in a balanced stance. His left arm remains bent at the elbow, positioned near his chest, and he gradually extends it outward, mirroring the movement of his right arm. Throughout the sequence, his body remains grounded and controlled. By the final frame, the man has completed his sequence of movements, with both arms extended forward in a balanced stance.
